headline: AMC Entertainment Holdings announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025.
investor_impact: The release of Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results is a major catalyst for the stock, providing critical visibility into box office recovery, cash burn, and debt management. Investors and analysts must review the attached Exhibit 99.1 press release for specific revenue, adjusted EBITDA, and liquidity metrics to update valuation models.
